title: Short-Term Rental
description: Schema for short-term vacation rental listings (Airbnb, VRBO, etc.).

listing_id.description: Platform-specific listing identifier. Commonly found in: listing URL slug, page metadata, listing ID field.

title.description: Title or name of the rental listing. Commonly found in: listing page header, h1 tag, og:title meta tag.

platform.description: Platform hosting the listing (e.g., Airbnb, VRBO). Commonly found in: site domain, platform branding, page footer.

host_name.description: Name of the property host. Commonly found in: host profile section, listing header, contact info.

host_is_superhost.description: Whether the host has superhost or equivalent status. Commonly found in: host profile badge, superhost indicator, listing header.

property_type.description: Type of space offered. Commonly found in: listing header, property type badge, room type indicator.

city.description: City where the rental is located. Commonly found in: listing location, breadcrumb, map section.

state.description: State or region of the rental. Commonly found in: listing location, breadcrumb, map section.

country.description: Country where the rental is located. Commonly found in: listing location, breadcrumb, map section.

latitude.description: Geographic latitude coordinate. Commonly found in: map embed data, JSON-LD structured data.

longitude.description: Geographic longitude coordinate. Commonly found in: map embed data, JSON-LD structured data.

bedrooms.description: Number of bedrooms. Commonly found in: listing specs bar, property details, header stats.

bathrooms.description: Number of bathrooms. Commonly found in: listing specs bar, property details, header stats.

max_guests.description: Maximum number of guests allowed. Commonly found in: listing specs bar, guest capacity display, header stats.

nightly_rate.description: Base nightly rate in the listed currency. Commonly found in: price display, nightly rate box, booking widget.

weekend_rate.description: Weekend nightly rate. Commonly found in: pricing details, rate breakdown, booking widget.

cleaning_fee.description: One-time cleaning fee per booking. Commonly found in: fee breakdown section, booking summary, pricing details.

service_fee.description: Platform service fee per booking. Commonly found in: fee breakdown section, booking summary, pricing details.

minimum_nights.description: Minimum number of nights required per booking. Commonly found in: listing policies section, booking widget, availability details.

maximum_nights.description: Maximum number of nights allowed per booking. Commonly found in: listing policies section, booking widget, availability details.

review_count.description: Total number of guest reviews. Commonly found in: review section header, listing rating display, review count badge.

review_rating.description: Average guest review rating. Commonly found in: listing header rating, star rating display, review summary.

amenities.description: List of amenities available at the rental. Commonly found in: amenities section, what this place offers, listing features.

cancellation_policy.description: Cancellation policy for the listing. Commonly found in: cancellation policy section, booking terms, listing policies.

images.description: URLs of listing images. Commonly found in: photo gallery, image carousel, og:image meta tag.

description.description: Full text description of the rental. Commonly found in: listing description section, about this space, overview text.

instant_book.description: Whether the listing supports instant booking. Commonly found in: instant book badge, booking widget, listing header indicators.

page_title.description: Title of the source page. Tabstack auto-fills this from page metadata when left empty.

favicon.description: Favicon URL of the source page. Tabstack auto-fills this from page metadata when left empty.
